name: Upsells: Product Alert

title.fr: Notifier un client a propos d un produit
title.es: Notificar a un cliente sobre un producto
title.ro: Notifica un client despre un produs

description.en: Send a targeted product recommendation to a specific customer.
description.de: Eine gezielte Produktempfehlung an einen bestimmten Kunden senden.
description.fr: Envoyer une recommandation de produit ciblee a un client specifique.
description.es: Enviar una recomendacion de producto dirigida a un cliente especifico.
description.ro: Trimite o recomandare de produs tintita catre un client specific.

bot: When this warp is triggered: fetches the contact, composes a personalized product recommendation, and sends it via WhatsApp.

inputs.name: Contact
inputs.bot: The contact ID of the customer to send the product alert to.

inputs.name: Product Name

description.en: Name of the product to recommend

inputs.bot: The name of the product to recommend to the customer.

inputs.name: Reason

description.en: Why is this product relevant for them?
description.de: Warum ist dieses Produkt fuer sie relevant?
description.fr: Pourquoi ce produit est-il pertinent pour eux ?
description.es: Por que este producto es relevante para ellos?
description.ro: De ce este acest produs relevant pentru ei?

inputs.bot: Optional reason why this product is relevant for the customer.

actions.prompt: Compose a personalized product recommendation in German (du-form) for {{CONTACT_NAME}} about {{productName}}. Reason it's relevant: {{reason}}. Friendly tone.

success.fr: Envoi de la recommandation de produit...
